message:
test(durability): expand validation coverage and harden error logging

codec: Add tests for zero k_source and zero symbol_size rejection in
RepairData validation, invalid (non-power-of-two) config rejection, and
DecodeFailureClass classification for SingularMatrix and Cancelled cases.

config: Reject NaN and infinite repair_overhead values (was only checking
< 1.0). Add tests for NaN, +Inf, -Inf rejection, zero checkpoint_interval
and max_block_size rejection, minimum_decode_symbols u32::MAX saturation,
and repair_overhead exactly 1.0 edge case.

file_protector: Replace silent JSON serialization failure with explicit
tracing::warn logging so repair event recording failures are observable.

fsvi_protector: Replace silent directory fsync failure with tracing::warn
so post-atomic-replace sync errors are observable in structured logs.

metrics: Add comprehensive tests verifying zeroed initial state, Default
equals new(), independent repair counters, cumulative encode accounting,
and decode success+failure both incrementing decode_ops.

repair_trailer: Add k_source=0 rejection for non-empty payloads during
deserialization. Add tests for empty symbols round-trip, zero k_source
with nonzero/zero source_len, and large (4096-byte) symbol data round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
